body:
## Summary
- Extend the shared Russian to English compositional fallback for the reported search/action phrase, including `examples of agreement` rendering.
- Change Rust and browser translation projection so zero-candidate translations become explicit gap responses with `translation_gap:<surface>` evidence instead of bracketed `[target] ...` placeholders.
- Add a CI/CD guard requiring language-facing PRs to add or update tests for every supported language from `data/seed/agent-info.lino` (`en`, `ru`, `hi`, `zh`).
- Tighten language-resource parity to every supported language and expand Rust/E2E unknown-gap regressions across English, Russian, Hindi, and Chinese.
- Refresh the issue #230 case study, raw GitHub/log artifacts, architecture research notes, changelog fragment, and verification logs.

## Tests
- `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`
- `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs`
- `bun install --frozen-lockfile`
- `bun run build:web`
- `git diff --exit-code -- src/web/vendor.bundle.js src/web/ocr.bundle.js`
- `npm --prefix tests/e2e ci`
- `npm run --prefix tests/e2e check:i18n`
- `npm run --prefix tests/e2e check:language-parity`
- `npm run --prefix tests/e2e check:language-test-coverage`
- `npm run --prefix tests/e2e check:intent-coverage`
- `GITHUB_BASE_REF=main rust-script scripts/check-changelog-fragment.rs`
- `GITHUB_EVENT_NAME=pull_request GITHUB_HEAD_REF=issue-230-a9436b51254d GITHUB_BASE_REF=main rust-script scripts/check-version-modification.rs`
- `cargo test --test unit specification::translation_via_links::translation_gaps_are_reported_without_language_placeholders -- --nocapture`
- `cargo test --test unit specification::translation_via_links:: -- --nocapture`
- `npm --prefix tests/e2e run test:local -- issue-230.spec.js`
- `cargo test --all-features --verbose`
- `cargo test --doc --verbose`

Case study: `docs/case-studies/issue-230/README.md`

Fixes #230

## Working session summary

PR #231 is updated and ready for review: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/pull/231

I pushed commit `b568528` (`Report translation gaps without placeholders`). It removes the bracketed language fallback by representing missing translations as explicit `translation_gap` evidence in both the Rust solver and browser worker, while preserving the Russian phrase fix for issue #230. I also added Rust and E2E regressions for unknown translation gaps so `[ru] ...` / `[en] ...` placeholders do not come back.

Verification:
- Local checks passed, including `cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy`, full Rust tests, web build, E2E local issue tests, i18n/parity/intent checks, changelog/version checks, and package size check.
- CI passed on latest commit: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/actions/runs/26307226544
- PR is no longer draft, merge state is `CLEAN`, and the working tree is clean.

Research notes were recorded in the case study, including Wikidata senses, MediaWiki parsing, and Wiktionary translation template references:
https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Wikidata:Lexicographical_data/Documentation/Senses
https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/API:Parsing_wikitext
https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Template:t%2B
